<features>
- observable feature: repeating pattern of hexagons
- observable feature: light beige color
- observable feature: uniform size and spacing of hexagons
</features>
<kb>
- IF [repeating pattern of hexagons] THEN [18]

- IF [perforated metal with diamond-shaped holes] THEN [27]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image displays a repeating pattern of hexagons, which matches the condition for class 18.
</rule_check>
<response>18</response>
